'''chaluru''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:pycrite|pycrite]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-l-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pycrite|pycrite]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| chaluru
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || chælirith || chælirij || chælirish || chæliri
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || chaluluruth || chaluluruj || chalulurush || chaluluru
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || chaluruth || chaluruj || chalurush || chaluru
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || chalufrufth || chalufrufj || chalufrufsh || chalufruf
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || chaluruthu || chaluruju || chalurushu || chaluruku
|-
| [[Patient]] || chaluruth || chaluruj || chalurush || chaluru
|-
| [[Possessive]] || chaluruthul || chalurujul || chalurushul || chalurukul
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || chaluruuthuthu || chaluruujuju || chaluruushushu || chaluruuku
|-
| [[Dative]] || chaluruthun || chalurujun || chalurushun || chalurukun
|-
| [[Speaker]] || chaluruthuoro || chalurujuoro || chalurushuoro || chalurukuoro
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|d176386}}
